summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to use a different entry scaffold from the adjacent chapter while preserving the same scene, information, and tone.
edits: Reframed the opening around the dormitory bed setup and darkened room instead of starting with the repeated manuscript-problem line.
Kept the three-day passage difficulty and overlapping-agreements beat intact, but moved them later in the opening for better separation from Chapter 7.
Left the detention sequence and Miren aftermath confrontation unchanged in substance.
